response.justification: Strong senior engineer with broad full-stack, open-source, and Linux experience plus a founder role running an open-source GIS platform, which aligns well with the technical and digital-sovereignty focus of the role. However, German is listed as Basic vs. the C1 requirement, Python and UML are not in evidence, and the resume shows individual-contributor seniority rather than explicit team-leadership or executive-level management experience.
strengths: Founder of an open-source platform — deep OSS, Linux, and architecture exposure
13+ years across web, backend, mobile, embedded with modern stacks
Track record of mentoring, workshops, and community teaching
concerns: German only Basic — far below the required C1 level
No explicit Python or UML experience listed
Limited evidence of formal team-lead / executive leadership responsibility
